message:
🐛 Fix nilaway nil-safety violations in settings and config managers (#1659)

Add nil guards to GetSettingsManager() and GetConfigManager() singleton
functions. Static analysis (nilaway) cannot prove that sync.Once
guarantees the global variable is non-nil after Do(), so an explicit
nil check after the Do() call satisfies the analyzer.

Also adds defensive nil checks:
- sm.key == nil guard in GetAll() before decrypt calls
- nil receiver checks on GetSettingsPath/SetSettingsPath/SetKeyPath

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
